error.no_code: Couldn't find a `code` parameter in the URL you pasted. Paste the full `com.sharkninja.shark://...?code=...` URL or just the code value.

data_description.region: Shark IQ uses different services in the EU. Select your region to connect to the correct service for your account.

user.description: Sign in to your SharkClean account. If Shark's Auth0 captcha trips, you'll be asked to complete a one-time browser login.

data_description.redirect_url: Paste the full `com.sharkninja.shark://login.sharkninja.com/...?code=...&state=...` URL from your browser, or just the `code` value.

pkce.description:
Shark's Auth0 service requires a one-time browser sign-in (captcha).

1. Open this URL in a private/incognito browser window:

   {pkce_url}

2. Sign in with your SharkClean credentials and complete any captcha.
3. The browser will try to navigate to a URL starting with `com.sharkninja.shark://...` and fail to load. Open DevTools (F12) → Network tab → find the request `authorize/resume?...` (status 302). In its Response Headers, copy the `Location:` value — it will start with `com.sharkninja.shark://` and contain `?code=...&state=...`.
4. Paste that URL below.

Once verified, we'll cache the Auth0 refresh token so future restarts skip this step.

reauth_confirm.description: Sign in again to refresh credentials. If Auth0 demands verification you'll be guided through the browser login.

invalid_room.message: The room {room} is unavailable to your vacuum. Make sure all rooms match the SharkClean app, including capitalisation.

clean_room.description: Cleans a specific user-defined room or set of rooms.
clean_room.name: Clean room
